notes: Prospectors Plus 4.0.1 - stability fix. Closing the app now fully quits it (and stops the macro): previously a few hidden helper windows could keep it running in the background, so it wouldn't reopen and the macro kept going. Everything from 4.0.0 (Cycle page, Builds page, Shards mode, live HUD, reworked finds, machine-locked codes) is included.
